turns.speaker: S0
turns.text: Hey, are you free tonight after work for a quick movie?

turns.speaker: S1
turns.text: Yeah, I think so, as long as it starts after dinner.

turns.speaker: S0
turns.text: Perfect, there is a new one at seven near the station.

turns.speaker: S1
turns.text: Sure, that works for me, send me the ticket link.
